ariaSpec.usage: The context menu implements the menu role.
Indicates a popup menu is associated with the item.
Indicates whether the submenu is expanded.
Informs assistive technologies that a Menu item is disabled.
Expand arrow elements are hidden from assistive technologies.
Points to the ID of the submenu.
Each nested menu has an id linked to parent aria-controls.

kbSpec.behavior: When applied to a target, the command opens the ContextMenu.
(For root items) opens the item and focuses the last child.; (For child items) closes and focuses the parent.
If the item has children, opens the item and focuses the first child. For child items without children, focuses and opens the next root item.
Closes the ContextMenu and returns the focus to the target.
Selects the focused item. If the item has children, opens the item and focuses the first child. If the item does not have children and has a URL, navigates to the specified URL.
Selects the focused item. If the item has children, opens the item and focuses the first child. If the item does not have children and has a URL, navigates to the specified URL.
Focuses the next item with text starting with the character.
